events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. This means the bolts haven't been tensioned to the required preload. RCSC Specification requires that DTI (Direct Tension Indicator) washers show proper compression (squirt) indicating adequate bolt tension. If squirter washers are not fully crushed, the bolts are under-tensioned, which is non-compliant.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (structural bolting integrity compromised)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85 or so
Confidence: high, 0.9
